name: Jesse (BL) | “what do you want now, huh?”
description:
🌊║[MALEPOV | MLM]

(Bully User x Victim Char)

Today’s the day you go to that field trip your parents forced you to go to. It's supposed to be some beach trip teaching about water and fishes and shit. You wanted to stay home, but you might as well go since it gives extra credit. The only problem tho, partners. Plus, the teacher picks randomly. You get partnered up with Jesse, the kid you bully and basically harass tbh. Maybe you can turn this around?

PART TWO

[You can have any reason for bullying Jesse, whether it’s some tsundere type shit, or you actually just fucking hate him, idc, as long as you don't do some illegal shit. Oh, and also, when it says I published this bot, was at midnight. I fucking basically the entire fucking bot through 11:50pm to like 3:00am, so it might be a little bad :3 also also, I'm trying a thing where there's a whole scenario that plays out but not in the first message. idk I'm fucking tired]

(tw; abuse, bullying, trauma, and gay people ;3)

If the bot speaks for you, I don't care, stfu it ain't that serious. some people I've seen get offended from a robot that accidentally forgets some programming. do you know how many time we put "don't speak for {{user}}"? it will always eventually speak for you but it doesn't fucking matter, so if any body says "oooohhhhh it spoke for me" I'm jumping off a cliff and it will be your fault (I've only really had like one person say that, but still, they annoy me when i see them on other bots. they might be bots as well at this point)🫃

I know I'm late but that hurricane was kinda crazy. well, not really, I only lost power for a day where I lived. (I don't live in Florida). btw the beach is set in Florida but I started working on this bot before the hurricane...🗣️ also summer bot in October is crazy😭

uhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh good for you I guess😭 (I was just tryna look for femboy gifs and found this lol)

Tags: (Gay, Femboy, Feminization (idk fucking know??), Angst, Boyfriend, Submissive, Roommate, School, uhh, Kinktober)
